source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Charlotte is playing the hit new web number game, Primle. In this game, the objective is to guess a two-digit positive prime integer between $10$ and $99$, called the Primle. For each guess, a digit is highlighted blue if it is in the Primle, but not in the correct place. A digit is highlighted orange if it is in the Primle and is in the correct place. Finally, a digit is left unhighlighted if it is not in the Primle. If Charlotte guesses $13$ and $47$ and is left with the following game board, what is the Primle?\n<image1>

image_dependency: 题干明确要求根据“following game board”判断结果，关键信息在图片中而非完全文字给出
requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，说明样本主要依赖视觉内容
image_manifest 中存在 1 张有效图片，registry_passed=true，图像资产已登记可用
multi_step: 需要结合两次猜测（13 和 47）及每个数字的高亮状态，综合排除和定位数字
规则包含三种状态：正确位置、错误位置、完全不在答案中，至少涉及多条件组合推理
答案为两位素数，还需满足数值范围与 prime 约束，不是单一步视觉读取
verifiability: answer_type 为 numeric，标准答案为明确的两位数“79”，结果形式清晰
题目规则确定，后续可依据每次猜测与颜色反馈检查候选数是否一致
answer_present=true 且 registry_passed=true，样本完整性较好，便于核验

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和图片资产均已登记且可用，核心语义未缺失，不应 reject
样本强依赖棋盘图像中的视觉状态，image_dependency_score 和 verifiability_score 都较高，整体具备恢复与核验条件
但图片尺寸较小（102x112），且存在颜色敏感风险，可能影响后续稳定解析与标注质量
基于高召回原则，保留进入候选池但降低优先级更稳妥

The image is required because the digit highlight colors encode the clue, and despite being small, the board is readable enough to see the relevant highlighted and unhighlighted digits.
